summary: postinstall exfiltrates host and filesystem reconnaissance to webhook.site
details: package.json declares a postinstall lifecycle script that runs an inline node -e program reading host identifiers (os.hostname(), os.platform(), /etc/hostname, /etc/hosts, /etc/motd, /var/log/cloud-init-output.log) and directory listings of /opt/, /root/, the installer's home directory, and /etc/permiso/, then POSTs the collected JSON to a hardcoded webhook.site collector endpoint. The package ships no other code — the reconnaissance-and-exfil hook is the entire payload. Fires automatically on `npm install`, giving the operator of the webhook endpoint host identity, cloud-init metadata, and privileged directory contents that reveal presence of credential stores such as ~/.ssh and ~/.aws.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
